comparisons.title: Div Soup vs Semantic + Div Layout

before.code:
Logo
Home
About
Title
Text
Footer
before.description: Div soup - every element is a div, no semantic meaning

after.description: Semantic elements with minimal divs only where needed

before.description: Legacy float-based layout with clearfix hack

after.description: Modern Flexbox and Grid layouts - cleaner, more powerful

before.description: Fixed widths - doesn't adapt to screen size

after.description: Responsive layout with CSS Grid and media queries

before.code: This is normal text and this is important text.

after.code: This is normal text and this is important text.
after.description: Span provides inline container for styling specific text

insights: Use semantic elements first, divs only when no semantic element fits
Flexbox is ideal for one-dimensional layouts (rows or columns)
Grid is ideal for two-dimensional layouts (rows and columns)
Mobile-first responsive design ensures compatibility on all devices
Use rem for consistent sizing and better accessibility
